title: Magick Experience
description: Magick Experience adds origins that players will receive randomly when they first visit the world
body:
Magick Experience adds origins that players will receive randomly when they first visit the world.
Each origin has its own abilities. To select an ability, press R (or a key you have customised yourself). To use activated abilities, press G (or a key you have customised).


**Fighter of Light**
- Recovery Technique
- Solar Kick
- Damage Absorption

**Necromancer**
- Recovery Technique
- Touch of Death
- Dark Portal to the Nether Soul

**Druid**
- Recovery Technique
- Trail of Bone Meal
- Transfurmation

**Martial Artist**
- Dash
- Strong Punch (select this move and hit mob)
- Uppercut (select this move and hit mob)
- One Last Push

**Lao King**
- Dash
- Dash and Slash
- Touch of Enchantment (first pick up an unenchanted sword)
- Windiness Form

**Wind Breaker**
- Dash
- Multiple Dashes
- Heavy Storm

**Traveller**
- Dash
- Recovery Technique
- Speed I (passive ability)
- Speed II (if traveller player attacked)
- Good Morning! (gets random effects when getting out of bed)
